name: EmpireHazeClaw Ultra-Light Core
description: Minimal portable backup for AI agent system migration

import_instructions.step_1: Copy /core/ directory to new AI environment
import_instructions.step_2: Place memory/ files in target system's memory/ directory
import_instructions.step_3: Place scripts/ files in target system's scripts/ directory
import_instructions.step_4: Install requirements: pip install -r requirements.txt (none required for core)

core_scripts.evening_capture.py: Creates daily fleeting note template at 21:00 UTC
core_scripts.nightly_dreaming.py: Analyzes KG + Memory, generates insights at 02:00 UTC

dependencies: NONE - Core scripts use only Python stdlib
notes: No SOUL.md, no agent workspaces, no logs, no personal data
